title: stelis triaristata
intro: Stelis triaristata, also known as the Triaristate Stelis or Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Stelis triaristata include the potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis triaristata can be made by infusing the plant in water or using it in a topical ointment or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
